# Activate:     source /work2/11114/zhixingliu/stampede3/AI-RES/.venv/bin/activate

# Upstream code: /work2/11114/zhixingliu/stampede3/AI-RES/artifacts/derecho_glade/PanguWeather/v2.0/
# Smoke import:  cd <upstream>; PYTHONPATH=. python -c "import long_inference"
#
# Required additions to base venv (4 packages, all pure-Python or wheel-only)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# These were missing from the venv and required by the import chain of
# upstream `long_inference.py` (and its transitive `networks/` + `utils/`):
natsort==8.4.0           # long_inference.py:1396 — ckpt_epoch_*.tar globstr ordering
tensorly==0.9.0          # networks/modulus_sfno/s2convolutions.py:19 — `import tensorly as tl`
tensorly-torch==0.5.0    # networks/modulus_sfno/s2convolutions.py — `from tltorch.factorized_tensors.core import FactorizedTensor`
Cartopy==0.25.0          # utils/power_spectrum.py:15 (re-exported via `from utils.power_spectrum import *`)

# Cartopy transitive deps (pulled in automatically by pip; pinned for reference)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
shapely==2.1.2
pyshp==3.0.3

# Already-present packages compatible with PanguWeather/v2.0 (no upgrade needed)

# Notes
# -----
# * `tltorch` is the import name; pip distribution is `tensorly-torch`.
# * `long_inference.py` uses `from utils.power_spectrum import *`, which
#   transitively imports cartopy at module load — `cartopy` is therefore
#   required even for inference-only invocations that never touch plotting.
# * Smoke-import command (last verified 2026-05-07):
#       cd /work2/.../PanguWeather/v2.0
#       python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); import long_inference; \
#                  from utils.data_loader_multifiles import get_data_given_path_nc; \
#                  from utils.YParams import YParams; \
#                  from networks.modulus_sfno.sfnonet import \
#                      SphericalFourierNeuralOperatorNet_v2 as SFNO; \
#                  print('OK')"
# * If the venv is rebuilt from scratch, install these four lines after the
#   base AI-RES requirements:
#       pip install natsort==8.4.0 tensorly==0.9.0 tensorly-torch==0.5.0 cartopy==0.25.0
